extensionDescription.message: A MutasdMeg! megnyitja és letölthetővé teszi a levelek TNEF (Transport Neutral Encapsulation Format) kódolással csatolt mellékleteit (általában winmail.dat).

attach_raw_mapi_check.hint.message: Attach a plain-text dump of raw MAPI properties alongside the decoded files.

direct_to_calendar_check.hint.message: Automatically open calendar invitations and contact cards without saving them first.

disable_filename_character_set_check.hin.message: Skip the OEM code-page → Unicode conversion of attachment filenames.

remove_winmail_dat_check.hint.message: Hide the raw winmail.dat attachment after its contents have been extracted.

strict_contenttype_check.hint.message: Only process attachments named "winmail.dat" or with content-type application/ms-tnef.

enable_debug_check.hint.message: Write verbose [LookOut] messages to the browser console.

tnef.info.prefix.message: What is TNEF? Learn more on the
